tree.name: Alijah Martin
tree.note: Drafted #39 overall by Toronto in 2025 out of FAU. Selected with POR's 2025 2nd round pick, acquired from SAC in the Jalen McDaniels trade (Jun 28, 2024).

assetsGivenUp.name: Jalen McDaniels
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: TOR traded Jalen McDaniels to SAC for Davion Mitchell, Jamal Shead, Sasha Vezenkov, and a 2025 2nd round pick (POR own, became Alijah Martin #39).
